title: Condensed Matter Physics
shortSummary: Solids, liquids, superconductors, semiconductors, and the quantum physics of materials — the largest branch of modern physics research.
whyItMatters: Condensed matter physics drives the technology you use every day — semiconductors, LEDs, solar cells, superconductors, and magnetic storage. It is the largest sub-field of physics and the most directly connected to industry and technology.
